sentences.text: Kimi K3 is the best performing model on ahead of Fable, reaching a comparable success rate in less time.
This is the first time that an open model is ahead of all proprietary ones for this comprehensive web engineering benchmark.

Notes: ▪️ Benchmarks don’t always tell the full story, although this is important signal, adding to mounting evidence that this could be a breakthrough moment for open models ▪️ No model as of yet has reached 100% completion on this set of evals.
The top performer peaks at 92% and 96% “with help”

paragraphs.zh: Kimi K3 在 ahead of Fable 上是表现最好的 model，以更短时间达到了可比的成功率。这是 open model 首次在这个综合性的 web engineering 基准测试中领先于所有 proprietary model。备注：▪️ benchmark 并不总能讲完整个故事，不过这仍是一个重要信号，也进一步印证了越来越多的证据：这可能是 open model 的一个突破性时刻 ▪️ 目前还没有任何 model 在这组 evals（评测）上达到 100% 完成率。当前最佳表现者的峰值是 92%，而“with help”时可达 96%

sentences.text: this is who runs this account 🧉

paragraphs.zh: 这就是运营这个账号的人 🧉

sentences.text: I’m excited to welcome two legends of developer tools, Pete Hunt (@floydophone) and Nick Schrock (@schrockn), to Vercel.
Pete was one of the pioneers of @reactjs at Meta.
He made an early bet to power Instagram Web with ⚛️ React, evangelizing it internally and externally.
He will be running Frameworks and leading @nextjs.
I couldn’t imagine a better person to lead React’s most popular framework to even greater heights.
Nick co-invented @graphql, solving some of the gnarliest data infrastructure and access issues at Facebook scale, with a delightful developer experience.
He will be working on Agentic Developer Experience, solving the problem of enabling the next billion agents and leading the way to a future of self-improving software.
It’s a dream-come-true for a founder of a startup to welcome engineering minds of this caliber who are also wonderful humans.
You probably want to work with them, and they’re hiring 😁.
Their DMs are open, from job applications to bug reports!

paragraphs.zh: 我很高兴欢迎 developer tools 领域的两位传奇人物，Pete Hunt (@floydophone) 和 Nick Schrock (@schrockn)，加入 Vercel。Pete 是 Meta 的 @reactjs 先驱之一。他很早就押注用 ⚛️ React 来驱动 Instagram Web，并在公司内外积极推广它。他将负责 Frameworks，并领导 @nextjs。我想不出还有谁比他更适合带领 React 最受欢迎的 framework 迈向更高的高度。Nick 是 @graphql 的共同发明者之一，在 Facebook 这样的规模下，他解决了一些最棘手的数据基础设施和访问问题，同时还带来了令人愉悦的 developer experience（开发者体验）。他将投身于 Agentic Developer Experience，解决如何赋能下一个十亿 agent 的问题，并引领我们走向一个软件能够自我改进的未来。对于一位 startup 创始人来说，能欢迎这样级别的工程头脑加入，而且他们还都是非常棒的人，简直是梦想成真。你大概会想和他们一起工作，而他们也正在招人 😁。他们的私信是开放的，无论是投递工作申请还是提交 bug report（缺陷报告）都可以！
